entries.reason: CannotKick (v83 SP_5059 'Cannot kick another user in this map') is version-absent in gms_v72: no OnPartyResult switch case @0x934f3c decrypts to that string, and v72 lacks the v83 case-25 slot (upper arms shift -1). Proven via in-process StringPool decryption (task-113 party-family agent). party.yaml CANNOT_KICK lists only gms_v83+.
